offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, unmonitored software license usage causes unnecessary expenses. We provide alerts for potential cost savings instead of manual tracking of software licenses.
problem: High software license costs due to unmonitored usage.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM 20-50 firms with a demo video
Participate in forums for accounting tool discussions
try_it: Let users try usage tracking dashboard for 1-3 licenses
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with clear CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Offer early access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing licenses
